author_rating_explanation: The first author is affiliated with Pfizer (United States), a major US company but not a top AI/tech company in the defined bands. The last author lists Fitbit (United States), also a recognized company but not in the top AI company band. Neither affiliation qualifies for 9-10, and neither is an academic institution in the top or mid-tier bands. However, both are well-known US corporations with verifiable research output, placing this at the lower end of 6-8 is inappropriate; it fits 5-6 as mid-tier verifiable organizations.
